text:
```json
[
  "CH4 is methane, a colorless, odorless, highly flammable simple hydrocarbon and potent greenhouse gas.",
  "CH4 consists of one central carbon atom bonded to four hydrogen atoms, with four valence electrons, no lone pairs, and four bonding electron pairs.",
  "The molecular shape of CH4 is tetrahedral with 109.5-degree bond angles and equal C-H bond lengths of approximately 1.09 angstroms, a geometry explained by VSEPR theory and confirmed by X-ray diffraction and infrared spectroscopy."
]
```
json_data: CH4 is methane, a colorless, odorless, highly flammable simple hydrocarbon and potent greenhouse gas.
CH4 consists of one central carbon atom bonded to four hydrogen atoms, with four valence electrons, no lone pairs, and four bonding electron pairs.

The molecular shape of CH4 is tetrahedral with 109.5-degree bond angles and equal C-H bond lengths of approximately 1.09 angstroms, a geometry explained by VSEPR theory and confirmed by X-ray diffraction and infrared spectroscopy.
